documents.title: Creatine supplementation for muscle growth: a systematic review
documents.abstract: Background: Creatine is widely used as an ergogenic aid. This systematic review evaluates the efficacy of creatine supplementation for increasing muscle mass in healthy adults.

documents.title: Creatine supplementation in endurance athletes: a meta-analysis
documents.abstract: Purpose: To assess the effect of creatine on endurance performance. Methods: Pooled analysis of 14 randomized controlled trials.
